title: Solum
description: Minecraft Vanilla-Like Modpack for you and your friends!
body:
This Modpack is for the 1-month Minecraft phase with your friends!

FEATURES:

- Global Map and Minimap
- Zoom
- AntiXray
- Shaders
- Supports Animated Texture Packs
- Invis Item Frames
- Better Enderdragon Fight
- Discord Extension to your Discord Chat
- Ingame Voicechat
- Lots of Performance Mods for Client AND Server
- And much more!
THOSE FEATURES ARE USED TO IMPROVE YOUR MINECRAFT PLAYSTYLE WHILE STAYING VANILLA! THIS MEANS YOU CAN STILL JOIN YOUR SERVER WITH VANILLA MINECRAFT!
